entry: Quick log: Our champion mr_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability, and we won 75% of the last 24h of closed trades. Slow is smooth, smooth is fast. Another honest cycle in the books.
good_signals: our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability
we won 75% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +1.369%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a 1.338%/trade edge at drop 5.5%→target 4.5%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
